ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Java program */,
  "input_program" TEXT /* Name or description of the Java program */,
  "original_size" TEXT /* Original size of the program before optimization */,
  "after_shrinking" TEXT /* Size of the program after shrinking */,
  "after_optimization" TEXT /* Size of the program after optimization */,
  "after_obfuscation" TEXT /* Size of the program after obfuscation */,
  "total_reduction" TEXT /* Total size reduction percentage */,
  "time_taken" TEXT /* Time taken to perform optimizations */,
  "memory_usage" TEXT /* Memory usage during execution */,
  "program_version" TEXT /* Version of the program */,
  "optimization_techniques" TEXT /* JSON object containing the optimization techniques applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the program's details */,
  "last_optimized_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last optimization run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program analyzed in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations regarding the optimization */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "memory_before_optimization" TEXT /* Memory usage before optimization */,
  "memory_after_optimization" TEXT /* Memory usage after optimization */,
  "execution_time_before_optimization" TEXT /* Execution time before optimization */,
  "execution_time_after_optimization" TEXT /* Execution time after optimization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_reports_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the optimization report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES optimization_reports ("report_id")
)
